case_title: MCCLAIN, RICHARD VS VETERANS CAB CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $573.44 FILED BY MCCLAIN, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT VETERANS CAB CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCLAIN, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VETERANS CAB CO. $573.44 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $619.44, STIPULATED JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VETERANS CAB CO.
